task.title: Include message ID in read_messages output

messages.content:
FINDING — root cause of wrong source_msg_id on task 44:

The `read_messages` tool formats each message as `[P5] From: <id> at <ts>\n<content>` — it never includes `m.id` in the output. So when I got the human message "Revisit last commit…", I had no way to extract its ID (860). I got an error saying `source_msg_id` was required, so I passed `1` as a placeholder — which the DB apparently resolved to message 861 (my own outbound task message to the worker).

**Fix in progress:** I've asked developer :25 to add `[id=N]` to each message line in `read_messages`, and update the `source_msg_id` description to tell agents to extract it from that tag. Once committed this will be a systemic fix — agents will always be able to link tasks back to the triggering human message.

title: Include message ID in read_messages output
label: good
